source_intake_record.raw_question_text: In the circuit shown in figure, a student designed a turn signal circuit where \( L \) is the indicator light, \( L_1 \) and \( L_2 \) are the left and right turn signal lights respectively, \( S \) is a single-pole double-throw switch, and \( E \) is the power source. When \( S \) is in position 1, the correct judgment is
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text: The power of \( L \) is less than its rated power

choice_map.A: The power of \( L \) is less than its rated power
choice_map.B: \( L_1 \) is lit, and its power equals the rated power
choice_map.C: \( L_2 \) is lit, and its power equals the rated power
choice_map.D: The total power of the branch containing \( L \) is greater than that of the other branch
